edgeCases: Codex runner before codex-support: missing tier entry falls to rule 4 (returns tier name, ok=false), never a claude/opencode ID
Role-override table beats a model_map entry for the same runner (rule 1 over rule 2)
Plain tier-string role value (big-thinker = "reasoning") still loads and resolves as before (union unmarshal back-compat)
Empty model string in model_map or models override rejected at load, error names the offending key
Tier/runner keys normalized (trim+lowercase) before validation; ' Reasoning ' and ' Opencode ' accepted
Unknown runner key (gemini), unknown role, unknown tier all fail load naming the key
Absent/empty model_map and models tables resolve every role to its built-in default (zero-config safe)
